title: erlangea marginata
intro: Erlangea marginata, also known as the yellow bird flower or yellow bird flower bush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in African and Asian cultures, to treat a range of health issues. The plant has been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Erlangea marginata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
